title: gymnaster savatieri
intro: Gymnaster savatieri, also known as the raccoon mushroom or black elfin saddle, is a species of fungus that belongs to the genus Gymnaster. This mushroom has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the immune system and fight off infections. The health benefits of Gymnaster savatieri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. The mushroom can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tinctures, capsules, and teas, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
